steps.title: Identify the equation structure
steps.content: The equation $20h + 14c = 716$ shows two income sources: $h$ hours at the regular job (multiplied by 20) and $c$ hours at the second job (multiplied by 14), totaling 716 dollars.

steps.title: Determine what 20 represents
steps.content: Since $h$ is measured in hours and $20h$ is part of a sum equaling dollars, 20 must convert hours to dollars—it's an hourly rate. Specifically, since $h$ is hours at the regular job, 20 is the hourly earnings at the regular job. That matches choice A — A is correct.
